title: StatePro Quantum Machine Schema
description: Official schema to validate StatePro quantum state machine JSON definitions (QuantumMachineModel). This schema documents shape, syntactic constraints, and runtime-oriented rules expected by the experimental engine.
$comment: Scope: validates structure and local rules. Global semantic constraints such as 'target must exist in universes/realities' or 'map key must match .id' cannot be fully guaranteed by standard JSON Schema without an additional semantic validation pass.

id.title: Machine ID
id.description: Technical machine identifier. It should remain stable at runtime and must follow the StatePro ID pattern.

canonicalName.title: Machine Canonical Name
canonicalName.description: Canonical identifier used to group different versions of the same conceptual machine.

version.title: Machine Version
version.description: Model version string used for traceability, migrations, and definition compatibility.

universes.title: Universes Map
universes.description: Map of universes that compose the machine. Each universe is a sub-state-machine with its own realities and transitions. Must contain at least one universe.
universes.$comment: Recommended rule (not enforceable by JSON Schema alone): map key should match universes.<key>.id.

initials.title: Machine Initial References
initials.description: List of machine bootstrap references. Each reference initializes a universe, or a universe at a specific reality.
initials.$comment: The experimental runtime processes refs in U:<universe> or U:<universe>:<reality> format. Do not use internal (non-U:) refs here.

universalConstants.title: Machine Universal Constants
universalConstants.description: Machine-level universal hooks executed around entry/exit/transition phases for active universes.

description.title: Machine Description
description.description: Human-readable functional description of the machine purpose.

metadata.title: Machine Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary machine metadata. Useful for UI, auditing, business flags, or external integrations.

identifier.title: StatePro Identifier
identifier.description: Base identifier format for machine, universe, and reality IDs. Must start with a letter. Letters, digits, underscore, and hyphen are allowed. Whitespace is not allowed.
identifier.$comment: Pattern aligned with experimental/helper.go and comments in theoretical/*.go.

version.title: Version String
version.description: Flexible version string without spaces. Allowed characters: letters, digits, dot, hyphen, underscore.

metadata.title: Metadata Object
metadata.description: Flexible object for additional information. It does not directly drive transitions unless custom executors consume it.

argumentValue.title: Behavior Argument Value
argumentValue.description: Allowed value type for action/condition/invoke/observer arguments. Scalars, objects, arrays, and null are accepted for compatibility with existing models.
argumentValue.$comment: Although early docs suggested string/number/boolean only, real examples include nested objects; this schema supports recursive structures.

args.title: Behavior Arguments
args.description: Argument map passed to executors. Keys follow StatePro naming convention (must start with a letter, then alphanumeric/_/-).

behaviorSource.title: Behavior Source
behaviorSource.$comment: Runtime defaults when source is missing/not found: observer src empty => true, condition src empty => true but missing registration => false, action/invoke missing registration => no-op with warning.

behaviorModel.title: Behavior Model
behaviorModel.description: Base contract shared by ObserverModel, ConditionModel, ActionModel, and InvokeModel.

src.description: Reference to the registered executor for this behavior.

examples.description: Approves when both required events are present

actionModel.title: Action Model
actionModel.description: Synchronous action. If it fails, the current transition or entry/exit phase fails.

invokeModel.title: Invoke Model
invokeModel.description: Asynchronous fire-and-forget invocation. Return value does not change control flow.

observerModel.title: Observer Model
observerModel.description: Observer used during superposition to decide when a reality can be established.

conditionModel.title: Condition Model
conditionModel.description: Transition guard. Must evaluate to true for a transition to fire.

transitionType.title: Transition Type
transitionType.description: Transition mode. 'default' abandons current reality. 'notify' dispatches to external targets while keeping the current reality active.

realityType.title: Reality Type
realityType.description: Reality classification: intermediate transition state or final state (successful/unsuccessful).

targetReference.title: Transition Target Reference
targetReference.description: Transition destination reference. Valid forms: <reality>, U:<universe>, U:<universe>:<reality>.
targetReference.$comment: Pattern is compatible with processReference() in the experimental runtime.

externalReference.title: External Universe Reference
externalReference.description: External reference with U: prefix. Used by machine.initials and by external transition targets.

transitionArray.title: Transition Array
transitionArray.description: Ordered transition list. Evaluation stops at the first approved transition.

nonEmptyTransitionArray.title: Non-Empty Transition Array
nonEmptyTransitionArray.description: Transition list that must contain at least one item. Used when field presence implies effective flow definition.

onTransitionsObject.title: Event Transition Map (on)
onTransitionsObject.description: Map from event name to transition list. Each key is an event name received by SendEvent.
onTransitionsObject.$comment: Empty arrays are allowed for compatibility with existing models; in that case, the event key exists but has no effective transition.

transitionModel.title: Transition Model
transitionModel.description: Defines a conditional transition between realities/universes. Includes guards, synchronous/asynchronous side effects, and destinations.

condition.description: Optional single condition. If present, it is included in the full condition set to evaluate.

conditions.description: Additional condition list. All conditions must evaluate to true (logical AND).

targets.description: Transition destinations. Multiple targets create superposition behavior in runtime.

actions.description: Synchronous actions executed when the transition is approved. Any action error aborts transition execution.

invokes.description: Asynchronous invokes executed when the transition is approved.

metadata.description: Auxiliary metadata for tooling, auditing, or presentation rules.

transitionModel.$comment: Execution order in doCyclicTransition(): constants actions -> transition actions -> constants invokes -> transition invokes -> apply type/targets effect.

then.$comment: notify transitions cannot target internal realities. Only external universe or universe:reality refs are allowed.

universalConstantsModel.title: Universal Constants
universalConstantsModel.description: Global action/invoke hooks for entry, exit, and transition phases.
universalConstantsModel.$comment: In current experimental runtime, machine.universalConstants is actively executed. universe.universalConstants exists in model types but is not explicitly applied in experimental/*.go.

entryInvokes.description: Asynchronous invokes executed on every reality entry.

exitInvokes.description: Asynchronous invokes executed on every reality exit.

entryActions.description: Synchronous actions executed on every reality entry.

exitActions.description: Synchronous actions executed on every reality exit.

invokesOnTransition.description: Asynchronous invokes executed on every transition execution.

actionsOnTransition.description: Synchronous actions executed on every transition execution.

realityModel.title: Reality Model
realityModel.description: State node inside a universe. Defines reality type, event transitions, automatic transitions, and entry/exit side effects.

id.description: Reality unique identifier within the universe.

on.description: Event-driven transition map. In runtime, if event key is absent, this reality has no transition for that event.

observers.description: Observers used during superposition to approve establishment of this reality.
observers.$comment: Current implementation evaluates observers sequentially in array order; first true wins.

always.description: Transitions evaluated automatically when this reality is established.

entryActions.description: Synchronous actions executed on reality entry.

exitActions.description: Synchronous actions executed on reality exit.

entryInvokes.description: Asynchronous invokes executed on reality entry.

exitInvokes.description: Asynchronous invokes executed on reality exit.

then.$comment: Practical rule: transition realities should define event-driven flow (on) or automatic flow (always).

universeModel.title: Universe Model
universeModel.description: State machine subgraph inside the quantum machine. It maintains independent current reality, mutable metadata, and tracking history.
universeModel.$comment: If initial is not defined, the runtime initializes the universe in superposition until observers/flow establish a concrete reality.

canonicalName.description: Canonical universe identifier used for logical grouping/versioning.

initial.description: Universe initial reality ID. Should exist in realities (additional semantic validation recommended).

universalConstants.$comment: Field is defined by theoretical.UniverseModel; current experimental runtime does not explicitly execute it.

metadata.description: Mutable universe metadata that executors can read/write at runtime.

tags.description: Free-form tags for classification, search, or tooling.
